nasb.text: “It happened when I returned to Jerusalem and was praying in the temple, that I fell into a trance,

esv.text: “When I had returned to Jerusalem and was praying in the temple, I fell into a trance

cnv.text: “後來，我回到耶路撒冷，在殿裡禱告的時候，魂遊象外，

ccb.text: “后来，我回到耶路撒冷，在圣殿里祷告的时候，进入异象，

csbs.text: “后来，我回到耶路撒冷，在圣殿里祷告的时候，魂游象外，
